name: RGWF96

datum.name: Reseau Geodesique de Wallis et Futuna 1996

area: Wallis and Futuna - onshore and offshore - Uvea, Futuna, and Alofi.
remarks: See CRS code 8902 for alternate system with axes reversed used by IGN for GIS purposes. On Wallis island, replaces MOP78 (CRS code 4639) for geodetic purposes.
